title: Patient Care Assistant
description: Direct patient care on med-surg unit at Parkland Memorial Hospital. Take vitals, assist nurses with ADLs, document in Epic EHR. CNA preferred, BLS required. Day and night shifts. Pay: $17.75/hr. Fair-chance employer; security clearance still required for clinical floors.

title: Environmental Services Technician
description: Hospital housekeeping at Parkland Memorial. Patient room turnover, OR cleaning, infection-control protocols. Training provided. Pay: $15.50/hr. Day and evening shifts. Background review post-offer; many roles open to applicants with records.

title: Dietary Services Worker
description: Cafeteria and patient meal prep at Parkland. Day and evening shifts. Uniforms provided. Aramark second-chance hiring program. Pay: $14.25/hr. Healthcare environment.

title: Surgical Tech
description: Operating room tech at Baylor Dallas. Set up sterile field, hand instruments, count supplies. Surgical Tech cert + BLS required. Pay: $26.00/hr. Day shift. Hospital. Background check post-offer.

title: Medical Records Clerk
description: Scan, file, and maintain patient records. HIPAA training provided. HS diploma required. Pay: $16.75/hr. Day shift. Healthcare administrative.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Inbound/outbound sort, pick, pack at the DAL5 fulfillment center. Day and overnight shifts. Pay: $18.50/hr. Background check post-offer; fair-chance employer.

title: Sortation Associate
description: Package sortation hub. Loading/unloading trailers, sorting packages by ZIP. Night shifts available. Pay: $19.00/hr starting. Reentry-friendly; case-by-case review for non-violent records.

title: Package Handler
description: Load and unload trailers at UPS Mesquite-area hub. Twilight and overnight shifts. Tuition assistance after 30 days. Pay: $21.00/hr. Background check post-offer.

title: Sanitation Driver (CDL-B)
description: Residential route driver. CDL-B required, will train clean MVR candidates. Pay: $22.50/hr starting. Day shift. Considers convictions individually after conditional offer.

title: Recycling Sorter
description: Materials recovery facility. Sort recyclables on conveyor line. Steel-toe boots required. Pay: $16.25/hr. Day shift. Fair-chance hiring.

title: Grounds Maintenance Worker
description: Apartment community grounds + light maintenance. Mow, trim, trash-out, light plumbing. Pay: $17.50/hr. Day shift. 7-year lookback; sex-offense exclusion.

title: Apartment Maintenance Tech
description: Multi-family unit turns: drywall, paint, light HVAC, appliance swap. EPA 608 a plus. Pay: $22.00/hr. Background check post-offer.

title: Line Cook
description: Downtown Dallas restaurant + workforce program. Saute, grill, prep stations. Hiring focus on young people exiting juvenile facilities. Pay: $17.00/hr. Evening shifts. Wraparound case management included.

title: Dishwasher
description: Back-of-house dish station. Entry-level, no experience required. Part of paid workforce-development program. Pay: $15.50/hr. Evening shifts.

title: Farm Crew Member
description: Urban farm in South Dallas. Planting, harvesting, beekeeping, animal care. Reentry-focused mission. Pay: $15.75/hr. Day shift. Outdoors year-round.

title: Cafe Worker
description: Counter service + light cooking at the Bonton market cafe. No experience required. Tip pool. Pay: $14.50/hr + tips. Day shift.

title: Donations Attendant
description: Greet donors, sort items, operate pallet jack. Full-time with benefits after 90 days. Pay: $14.25/hr. Day and evening shifts. Fair-chance hiring core to mission.

title: Retail Associate
description: Cashier, floor stocking, customer service in Goodwill thrift store. Pay: $13.75/hr. Variable shifts. Active second-chance employer.

title: Custodian - Dallas ISD
description: School building custodial work. Day shift (2pm-10:30pm) at elementary campuses. Pay: $15.00/hr. Texas Education Code requires fingerprint background check; certain convictions disqualifying.

title: DART Bus Operator Trainee
description: Paid CDL training program. Drive 40-foot transit buses on Dallas County routes after training + DOT physical. Pay: $20.50/hr training, $26.00/hr post-certification. Reviews convictions case-by-case.

title: DART Vehicle Service Worker
description: Bus and rail vehicle cleaning, fueling, fluid checks at DART operating yard. Pay: $18.75/hr. Overnight shifts. Background check post-offer.

title: Concrete Finisher
description: Commercial concrete crew on Dallas-area projects. Form, pour, finish. OSHA-10 required within 30 days. Pay: $24.00/hr. Day shift. Reviews convictions individually.

title: HVAC Service Helper
description: Assist licensed HVAC techs on commercial service calls across Dallas. EPA 608 within 6 months. Pay: $19.50/hr. Day shift; on-call rotation. Employee-owned; case-by-case review.

title: Cashier
description: Front counter at downtown Dallas Whataburger. Day, evening, overnight shifts. Pay: $14.50/hr + meal benefit. Considers convictions individually.

title: Fryer Cook
description: Hot-chicken fry station. Pay: $16.50/hr + tips. Evening and weekend shifts. Public second-chance employer.

title: Uniform Service Driver (CDL-A)
description: Route driver delivering uniforms + facility supplies to Dallas-area accounts. CDL-A + clean MVR. Pay: $25.00/hr. Day shift. 5-year lookback; reviews convictions individually.
